prompts.label: New Laravel project
prompts.text:
Install Laravel for a beginner on Windows.

- composer create-project, .env copy, php artisan key:generate
- php artisan serve
- Explain routes/web.php first route

Laravel 11 style if possible.

prompts.label: Blade template hello
prompts.text:
Create a Blade view and return from route.

- welcome customization with @section @yield layout

Show routes and two blade files.

prompts.label: Migration and Eloquent model
prompts.text:
Create Post model with migration title and body.

- php artisan make:model -m
- migrate, tinker create one post

Explain Eloquent ORM simply.

prompts.label: Controller resource index
prompts.text:
Resource controller for posts index and show only.

- Route::resource limited actions
- Return Blade views with compact posts

List artisan commands used.

prompts.label: Form validation Request
prompts.text:
Store post with validation rules title required max 255.

- Form Request or validate in controller
- Show errors in Blade @error

CSRF @csrf mention.

prompts.label: Auth Breeze overview
prompts.text:
Explain Laravel Breeze for login/register at high level.

- composer require, npm build, migrations
- What routes appear

Not full install log — learning map.

prompts.label: API routes Sanctum intro
prompts.text:
Outline API + Sanctum token auth for SPA.

- routes/api.php GET /user with auth:sanctum
- Difference web vs api middleware

Conceptual steps.

prompts.label: Seeder fake data
prompts.text:
Create factory and seeder for 20 fake posts.

- php artisan db:seed
- Use Faker via factory

Why seeders help development.

prompts.label: Queue jobs concept
prompts.text:
Explain queues and jobs without full Redis setup.

- When to dispatch slow mail send
- database driver mention

Diagram optional.

prompts.label: Deploy shared hosting notes
prompts.text:
Laravel deployment basics: public docroot, storage link, optimize.

- php artisan config:cache on server
- Never expose .env

Bullet checklist.

prompts.label: Implicit route model binding
prompts.text:
Explain implicit route model binding fetching {post:slug} or id.
Show customizing route key signatures.
Handle ModelNotFoundException mapping 404 gracefully.
Compare explicit binding registrations.
Mention localized route keys lightly.

prompts.label: FormRequest authorize plus validate
prompts.text:
Create PostStoreRequest validating title and body with authorize() boolean.
Show messages customization.
Explain dependency injection inside requests.
Relate Policy checks placement.
Keep controller skinny example narrative.

prompts.label: Eloquent Attribute accessors mutators
prompts.text:
Demonstrate Attribute::make accessor mutator pattern.
Compare older getFooAttribute verbosity.
Show JSON column casting subtly.
Mention immutable date casting.
Provide debugging pitfalls dd accidentally in production.

prompts.label: Database transactions closure
prompts.text:
Wrap transfers in DB::transaction.
Explain rollback on exceptions.
Mention deadlock retries optional teaser.
Relate asserting final balances in Pest or PHPUnit verbally.
Point to pessimistic locking teaser.

prompts.label: Events listeners queued
prompts.text:
Fire OrderShipped event with listener implementing ShouldQueue.
Discuss monitoring failed jobs verbally.
Compare synchronous listeners debugging ease.
Mention subscriber class grouping optional.
Relate to domain boundaries discussion lightly.

prompts.label: Policy abilities in Blade
prompts.text:
Register PostPolicy update checking ownership.
Use @can in Blade views alongside @cannot.
Show Gate authorize in controllers.
Explain middleware auth layering difference.
Mention streamlined Laravel skeleton variance lightly.

prompts.label: Vite plugin with artisan serve duo
prompts.text:
Explain pairing npm run dev with php artisan serve mental model.
Show @vite Blade directives referencing built assets.
Mention APP_URL host trust pitfalls briefly historically.
Relate migration from Mix philosophically concise.
List production vite build sequencing.

prompts.label: RateLimiter middleware configuration
prompts.text:
Define RateLimiter::for keyed APIs using Redis driver concept.
Attach throttle middleware routes.
Differentiate burst vs sustained verbally.
Explain Retry-After header exposure basics.
Mention customizing response JSON optional.

prompts.label: optimize clear caches playbook
prompts.text:
List config route view optimize clears when baffled caches.
Explain production config caching benefits cautions forgetting env.
Suggest deploy scripts codifying clears.
Mention queue restart after deploy note.
Tie supervisors lightly optional.

prompts.label: API Resource transformers masking fields
prompts.text:
Create PostResource masking internal columns shaping outward JSON responses.
Show conditional wrapping when appended relationships.
Relate Pagination Resource collections briefly.

Compare general transformer libraries philosophy lightly.
